market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: US government says it got hacked — again
articles.description: A top Democrat on the Senate's Intelligence Committee warned that the information accessed on a Homeland Security intelligence-sharing network may risk national security.

articles.title: Ondo Finance debuts SEC-aligned tokenized stock model with BlackRock ETF, Micron shares
articles.description: Broadridge and transfer agent Oasis Pro underpin a new structure that keeps tokenized securities within existing U.S. market rules, based on the SEC's third-party custodial model.

articles.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
articles.description: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

articles.title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
articles.description: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

articles.title: Tesla saw a massive sales jump in the second quarter
articles.description: The company delivered more than 480,000 EVs globally, seemingly thanks to geographic expansion and cheaper versions of the Model 3, Model Y, and Cybertruck.

articles.title: JPMorgan says Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds 'two-way risk' to crypto markets
articles.description: The bank said Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds avoidable market uncertainty and should be replaced with equity issuance to build cash reserves.

articles.title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
articles.description: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

articles.title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
articles.description: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

articles.title: 英飛凌斥資 50 億歐元德勒斯登半導體工廠啟用，重點生產汽車、能源、AI 晶片
articles.description: 德國半導體製造商英飛凌（Infineon）本週二於德國德勒斯登（Dresden）正式啟用被譽為全球最大的智慧半 […]

articles.title: U.S. payroll growth slowed sharply in June, with only 57,000 jobs added
articles.description: This morning's data could slow market expectations for a Fed rate hike as soon as this summer or early Fall.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Rivian raises EV sales forecast as Q2 production ramps up
articles.description: The company now expects to ship a few thousand more vehicles by the end of 2026 than it previously expected, after launching its R2 SUV last month.

articles.title: A struggling Nasdaq-listed company that tried to copy Saylor's Bitcoin playbook is completely dumping crypto for AI
articles.description: The Nasdaq-listed Korean media company once lined up $1 billion in financing to buy 10,000 bitcoin. A recent filing confirms its balance is now zero as it pivots to AI infrastructure and fights to stay listed.

articles.title: Three years after MiCA became law, Europe's crypto framework is undergoing a rethink
articles.description: Europe’s MiCA regime is now up for review, known colloquially as “MiCA 2.0,” through a consultation that closes around September.

articles.title: Warsh's comments set the stage for U.S. jobs data to ignite bitcoin, gold rally
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 2, 2026

articles.title: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
articles.description: Standard Chartered and Circle launch bank-led USDC minting and redemption for institutions, starting in Dubai’s DIFC with planned global expansion.

articles.title: Smaller tokens lead as bitcoin, sol rally in 'first real bounce of the selloff'
articles.description: Bitcoin and major cryptocurrencies rebounded on dovish Federal Reserve signals, with speculative tokens like Memecore’s M and Audiera’s BEAT leading gains.

articles.title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
articles.description: The Solana Foundation launched a framework for protocol-level governance, enabling validators with at least 100,000 delegated SOL to publish new proposals.

articles.title: SBI Crypto shuts Bitcoin mining pool after 5-year run
articles.description: SBI Crypto will shut down its Bitcoin mining pool on July 31 after more than five years, ranking 12th globally with about 2.2% of hashrate share.

articles.title: Bitcoin rises 4% to above $61,000 as inflation fears soften
articles.description: Bitcoin rose after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh said inflation risks had eased. A 7.9% drop in South Korea's Kospi on renewed AI chip worries did little to dent the bid.
